(Metro North Health via AP) 2026-07-22T03:10:11Z An Australian woman has given birth to identical quadruplet girls after a pregnancy doctors described as incredibly rare. Jenitar Sau Na’amoana, who is 34 years old and already had four children, delivered the babies last week at Royal Brisbane and Women’s Hospital in Queensland state. “We are very excited to be able to care for this amazing little family, a big family now,” Dr. Alexa Bend

Geopolitics.title: Greetings from Jerusalem, whose holy sites host some of the oldest colonies of nesting swifts
Geopolitics.summary: The scythe-winged birds have nested in the cracks of the Western Wall and other holy sites in Jerusalem for thousands of years.

Geopolitics.title: Great Barrier Reef microbiome mapped as researchers discover 500 bacterial species previously unknown to science
Geopolitics.summary: Research identifies 808,585 viral genomes belonging to what scientists estimate to be 362,802 different viruses Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast More than a decade after the human microbiome was comprehensively mapped, scientists have now identified the vast communities of microbes that make up the Great Barrier Reef. Geopolitics.title: 'It's all literally rubble': Lebanese poet returns to see what has become of her home
Geopolitics.summary: A village destroyed. A home erased. One poet returns to remember what was lost.

Geopolitics.title: French lawmakers approve a sweeping social media ban for children under 15
Geopolitics.summary: The move makes France the first country in the European Union to pass a blanket ban on platforms as concerns grow worldwide over the harmful effects of digital content on kids.

Geopolitics.title: AusAlert test will blast emergency warning siren over most phones in Australia on Monday. Here’s what to know
Geopolitics.summary: National emergency test alert will be sent to all mobile devices on 27 July, with domestic violence advocates advising how to turn off safe phones Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast Virtually every phone in the country will blare an emergency siren at 2pm AEST on Monday 27 July as part of the first Australia-wide test of a new national warning system called AusAlert. Geopolitics.title: Watch: Louvre reopens gallery after jewellery heist
Geopolitics.summary: The Louvre Museum reopens its Apollo Gallery nine months after a robbery that shocked France.

Geopolitics.title: Watch: Beluga whales travel by plane and lorry to US from closed Canadian marine park
Geopolitics.summary: Six beluga whales have arrived in Illinois and Texas after being moved from a Canadian marine park that could no longer care for them.
